_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of confidentiality, integrity, and availability principles.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of privacy-by-design and privacy-by-default principles, including their application to system architecture, data minimization, purpose limitation, storage limitation, and consent management design patterns.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.540), RC-K-012 (RC, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.595). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, principles]. DCWF-only terms [availability, confidentiality, integrity] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, architecture, consent, data, default, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.917, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.064 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (91.8%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of confidentiality, integrity, and availability principles." and "Knowledge of privacy-by-design and privacy-by-default principles, including thei". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.559 ≈ STS 0.595 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, principles] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, principles]. DCWF-only: [availability, confidentiality, integrity]. WIDAI-only: [application, architecture, consent, data, default, design].
